name: Kitchen remodel — multiple line items
description: Mid-size remodel with several distinct labor + material lines. Assistant should produce one quote with multiple line items.

user.content: Quote for the Hendersons: kitchen remodel. Demo of existing cabinets $1,200, new shaker cabinets installed $6,500, quartz countertop $3,800, plumbing rerouting for the island $900, and electrical for under-cabinet lighting $600.
